name: Sausage Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the bacon and remove the casings from the sausage.
2. Brown the bacon in a frying pan over medium heat until crispy.
3. Add the sausage to the pan and brown evenly.
4. While the bacon and sausage are cooking, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
5. Cook the spaghetti noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
6. Drain the cooked spaghetti and return it to the pot.
7. Stir in the chopped bacon, beaten eggs, and parmesan cheese.
8. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
9. Serve with salad and garlic bread on the side.
Preparation Time: 30 minutes.
